summary: The diff shows changes to both backend and frontend files. The backend has a new migration.mo file added and main.mo modified. The frontend has multiple files modified. A new migration.mo file and migration decorator appear in the backend, which may not have existed in Version 58, potentially violating the exact-revert requirement.

missing_requirements.requirement: All changes introduced in Version 59 are fully removed and the application exactly matches Version 58 state with no new additions.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff adds a brand-new file 'backend/migration.mo' and introduces 'import Migration "migration"' plus the '(with migration = Migration.run)' actor decorator in main.mo. These constructs appear to be newly introduced upgrade infrastructure not present in Version 58, violating the constraint of exact restoration without introducing new changes.

hallucinated_features.description: Addition of a migration module (migration.mo) with a Migration.run function and actor migration decorator in main.mo
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states 'Do not introduce any new features or changes beyond what is needed to restore Version 58' and 'Preserve the Version 58 state exactly as it was.' A new migration.mo file and the '(with migration = Migration.run)' actor decorator are additions not present in Version 58, introduced to handle stable memory migration during the upgrade.
